title: Tachpanchec #8471
definition:
Tahpanhes or Tahapanes or Tehaphnehes = "thou will fill hands with pity"

 1) a city in Egypt; modern 'Tel Defenneh' or 'Tel Defneh' located approx
    18 miles (29 km) east southeast from Tanis
nasbUsage:
